subject: Large imposing humanoid villain in a white cape and purple bodysuit with a golden belt, arms crossed, menacing expression
description: A large, muscular humanoid figure dominates the frame in a frontal pose with arms crossed. The figure wears a white cape or cloak-like outer garment over what appears to be a purple bodysuit, with a prominent golden belt at the waist. The face is broad and carries a stern, contemptuous expression. The background is predominantly dark purple with faint circular or geometric patterns, reinforcing the villainous, otherworldly atmosphere. The composition is a mid-shot from roughly the hips up, emphasizing the figure's imposing bulk.
foreground: large muscular humanoid in white cape, purple bodysuit, golden belt, arms crossed
background: dark purple with faint geometric or circular patterns
emotion: contemptuous, menacing, imperious — arms-crossed dominant posture
